description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with thread deatiling at the hem, round neck with fabric tape detailing, and graphic print on the front and backFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironTalk about style and comfort, and there's nothing to beat this t-shirt from spykar. The graphic print of a young guy on a scooter, with the back of the scooter on the print at the back adds unparalleled cool to this tee. Team this T-shirt with jeans and sports shoes and hit the road in style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6'3”; Shoulders: 19"
